ddls:
CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of ages in the group (e.g., 12 - 19 years) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or additional information about the age group */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population in the age group */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the age group data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of vaccination statistics */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group the statistics belong to */,
  "first_dose_administered" INTEGER /* Number of first doses administered */,
  "first_doses_per_1000" REAL /* Number of first doses per 1,000 people */,
  "fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of fully vaccinated individuals */,
  "fully_vaccinated_per_1000" REAL /* Number of fully vaccinated individuals per 1,000 people */,
  "second_dose_administered" INTEGER /* Number of second doses administered */,
  "second_doses_per_1000" REAL /* Number of second doses per 1,000 people */,
  "booster_dose_administered" INTEGER /* Number of booster doses administered */,
  "booster_doses_per_1000" REAL /* Number of booster doses per 1,000 people */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the vaccination statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_stats_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., North, South) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or additional information about the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population in the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the region data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regional_vaccination_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of regional vaccination statistics */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the statistics belong to */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group the statistics belong to */,
  "first_dose_administered" INTEGER /* Number of first doses administered */,
  "first_doses_per_1000" REAL /* Number of first doses per 1,000 people */,
  "fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of fully vaccinated individuals */,
  "fully_vaccinated_per_1000" REAL /* Number of fully vaccinated individuals per 1,000 people */,
  "second_dose_administered" INTEGER /* Number of second doses administered */,
  "second_doses_per_1000" REAL /* Number of second doses per 1,000 people */,
  "booster_dose_administered" INTEGER /* Number of booster doses administered */,
  "booster_doses_per_1000" REAL /* Number of booster doses per 1,000 people */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the regional vaccination statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regional_vaccination_stats_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regional_vaccination_stats_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the report covers */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group the report covers */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "vaccination_coverage" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is fully vaccinated */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Rate of vaccination (e.g., number of doses per day) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_reports_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)
